info.name: AidenStudentRegDemo
info.description:
## StudentRegDemo

This collection supports API testing for a **Student Registration** system. It covers the full set of CRUD operations for two core resources — **Students** and **Courses** — and is organized to validate both expected and edge-case behavior.

### Structure

| Folder | Description |
|---|---|
| **AddingStudents** | Requests to create student records, including valid inputs, boundary tests, and negative cases |
| **AddingCourses** | Requests to create course records, including valid inputs, boundary tests, and negative cases |
| **GetRequests** | Retrieve all students (`GetStudents`) and all courses (`GetCourses`) |
| **DeleteRequests** | Remove a student (`DeleteStudent`) or course (`DeleteCourse`) by ID |
| **UpdateRequests** | Modify an existing student (`UpdateStudent`) or course (`UpdateCourse`) by ID |

### Testing Approach

- **Positive cases** — valid payloads that should return successful responses
- **Boundary tests** — inputs at the edge of accepted value ranges (e.g., name length limits, GPA bounds, course size limits)
- **Negative cases** — invalid or incomplete payloads expected to trigger error responses; these requests are marked with `*` in their names

### Variables

| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `{{base_url}}` | The base URL of the API server (set in the active environment) |
| `{{student_id}}` | The ID of the target student, used in delete and update requests |
| `{{course_id}}` | The ID of the target course, used in delete and update requests |

Configure these variables in the **Local** environment before running the collection.
